name: devteam
description: An engineering team in a box for Claude Code. 8 specialized subagents (planner, fullstack-engineer, critic, debugger, vuln-verifier, frontend-designer, tool-expert, web-researcher) plus 11 automation hooks (pre-commit secret scan, MCP health tracking, cost tracking, batch format, design quality, config protection, and more) wired by the P7/P9/P10 methodology with three red lines: closure discipline, fact-driven, exhaustiveness.
